ORDER DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE ADDRESS ON THE PROOF OF SERVICE FOR PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AND FOR PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET NUMBER ONE DOES NOT MATCH THE ADDRESS LISTED BY DEFENDANT BRIAN SEPP ON THE ANSWER HE FILED WITH THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM ERNST HALPERIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Off Calendar

Mtn For Order That Matters In Req For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Robert Cohen (800-492-2657) special appearance for plaintiff moving party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. The address on the proof of service for Plaintiff's motion and for Plaintiff's request for admissions set number one does not match the address listed by defendant Brian Sepp on the answer he filed with the court. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
